message:
Remove redundant Installation sections from plugin READMEs

The docs site generates its own installation instructions, making
the README Installation sections redundant. This aligns with the
readme-style.md rule that states the script ignores this section.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
